Why choose me

THE TRACK RECORD

Real events. Real experience. Real results.

Margazhi '26 · IITM BS
IPL Auction Showdown

Hosted and managed the IPL Auction Showdown at IITM BS's online fest. Organised the full event on Google Meet — from player draws to bidding — with 40+ active participants.

IIT BHU · Inter-College
Drama Society — 3rd Place

Represented IITM BS Drama Society at IIT BHU's cultural fest and secured 3rd position. Proof that showing up for your college on any stage is something I take seriously.

School · Students Committee
Farewell Host

Part of the students committee that organised and hosted our school's very first farewell party for seniors. My first experience running a live event — and the bug never left.

Made with ❤️ for SPORTIFY · IIT Madras BS Degree Programme · 2026
